headline: Is Boeing (BA) Offering A Chance After Recent Safety Headlines And Share Price Pullback
summary: If you are looking at Boeing and asking whether the current share price gives you good value, you are not alone. This article focuses squarely on what the numbers say about that question. The stock closed at US$209.89, with returns of 29.7% over 1 year, 4.4% over 3 years and an 18.0% decline over 5 years, while the past month and past week have seen declines of 11.2% and 9.2% respectively. These moves can change how investors view both upside and risk. Recent headlines around Boeing have...
